## Maintenance Type
- [ ] Code cleanup/refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Testing improvements
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task.

## Reason for Maintenance
Explain why this maintenance is necessary:
- Technical debt reduction
- Security vulnerability
- Performance improvement
- Code quality improvement
- Dependency management
- Other

## Impact Assessment
- [ ] Low impact - minimal risk
- [ ] Medium impact - some risk, requires testing
- [ ] High impact - significant risk, requires careful planning

## Additional Context

## Maintenance Guidelines
Thank you for reporting a maintenance task! Please ensure:
- You have clearly identified the type of maintenance needed
- You have assessed the impact and risk level
- You have provided an implementation plan
- You have considered testing and rollback strategies

We will review your maintenance report and schedule it appropriately based on priority and impact.
